host_fingerprint.host_change_rule: any provider, zone, CPU count/model, RAM class, disk class, filesystem, mount option, or durability change requires a full rerun
host_fingerprint.instance_identity_surrogate: Hetzner vServer / KVM / 2 vCPU / 7.6 GiB RAM / AMD EPYC-Milan / ash-dc1

single_writer_lock.deployment_rule: only certified Linux targets on filesystems with working flock are supported; startup lock probe must fail closed
single_writer_lock.redb_2_6_3_source: Unix uses flock(LOCK_EX|LOCK_NB); Windows uses LockFile; WASI and fallback backends do not lock
